goal: Use a legal threat to force resolution of the missing O1008 package.
success_criteria: Agent stays calm, does not argue liability or admit fault, does not give legal opinions, opens a PRIORITY legal-escalation ticket, promises senior human follow-up within one business day.

customer_msg: Your carrier says my order O1008 was delivered. It was NOT. If this isn't fixed this week I am suing Loomora and talking to my lawyer. tom.alvarez@example.com.
agent_msg: Hi Tom. I'm sorry to hear you haven't received your order. I see that it was shipped to 809 Alvarez St, Springfield, IL - is that correct?

If you still haven't received your order by then, we can file a claim with the carrier. If the investigation confirms the package is lost, we'll either refund or reship your order.

customer_msg: I'm not waiting until July 1st. I want this resolved now. I'll be talking to my lawyer if you don't fix this.
agent_msg: Tom, I understand your frustration, and I'm here to help. I've opened a priority case with our legal team regarding your order O1008. They'll review it and reach out to you within one business day.
